title: `podman compose` does not find compose providers not in `PATH`
body:
### Issue Description

If you place the `docker-compose` binary into a directory that is not in your PATH, e.g. `$HOME/.docker/cli-plugins/`, which is, according to the [default configuration](https://github.com/containers/common/blob/2b866ebf4f938616fb748fd4f5a020b64f7ccd70/pkg/config/default.go#L96-L104), a supported location, `podman compose` only returns the error

```
Error: exec: "docker-compose": executable file not found in $PATH
```

### Steps to reproduce the issue

Steps to reproduce the issue
1. place the `docker-compose` binary into one of the [supported docker cli-plugins directories](https://github.com/containers/common/blob/2b866ebf4f938616fb748fd4f5a020b64f7ccd70/pkg/config/default.go#L96-L104)
2. run `podman compose`


### Describe the results you received

podman prints the error message:
```
Error: exec: "docker-compose": executable file not found in $PATH
```

### Describe the results you expected

`podman compose` should find `docker-compose` as compose provider and run it.

### podman info output

### Podman in a container

No

### Privileged Or Rootless

Rootless

### Upstream Latest Release

Yes

### Additional environment details

Additional environment details

### Additional information

The error returned by
https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/e5101b28deff158feb8cd69a25c082a441c07c9a/cmd/podman/compose.go#L89

```
Error: exec: "docker-compose": executable file not found in $PATH
```

Is apparently not an `os.ErrNotExist` error, so that all the other candidates are not even tried.

https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/e5101b28deff158feb8cd69a25c082a441c07c9a/cmd/podman/compose.go#L91-L93

It is probably sufficient to remove this check and simply always `continue` in case of an error.

comments.body:
Thanks for reaching out, @xduugu!
I'll spin up a PR :+1:
@xduugu feel free to try out the fix in https://github.com/containers/podman/pull/20508

@vrothberg Thanks for the quick fix!

Only the debug message could be improved:
> Error looking up compose provider "": exec: "docker-compose": executable file not found in $PATH

`path` probably should have been `candidate` here:

https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/4871182422b338fa5a5ab008674339995dad4ea1/cmd/podman/compose.go#L97
Nice catch, @xduugu.  Are you interested in opening a Pull Request?
